visual_description: A child clings to a blue garment in a tiled room while a man in a maroon jacket moves through a hallway. A hand swings an axe to strike a wooden door, causing it to crack, and a person lies in snow beneath the door. The scene shifts to a night exterior of a building where a figure climbs a snowy slope, ending with a woman in a light sweater looking forward.
